Share Icons: 
Preview: 

This is the 3 Tier Digital Studios Fantasy Ruins Pack which was released by Ron Kapaun as CC0 - Public Domain. For more info check out the website here.

The models are in DAE format and should work "out of the box" with Torque 3D. The pack contains:

  • Ruined Cathedral
  • Corner/Foundation Ruin
  • Roman Rail
  • 3 x Pillar/Column
  • Ruined Arch
  • 2 x Ruined Wall Segment
  • Speaking Stones
  • 2 x Ruined Temple

As well as all the textures required for them. I will be adding more previews later, just want to upload a few of the packs to OGA first. I have added all the packs into a collection which is available here: 3TD Studios Packs

Copyright/Attribution Notice: 
None required but it would be nice if you could credit Ron Kapaun/3TD Studios if you use any of these.
File(s):
